changes.purpose: Phase 0 — git state, stream inventory, vault inventory, architecture inventory, drift assessment
Phase 1 — term-by-term evaluation. Central decision: ECP→PICP, ECR→PICR. 10 terms locked, 3 superseded
Phase 2 — L0-L5 pipeline model, PICP artifact spec, materializer architecture, PRE specification, layer authority model
Phase 3 — marketplace entries are Domain Cognition Modules (L2-L4) + Projection Family access (L5). Two-axis commercial model
Phase 4 — what consumers receive (9 objects + metadata + provenance), may do (render/hide/compress/expand/reframe), may NOT do (create cognition, modify PICP, 13 prohibitions)
Phase 5 — Program Intelligence Cognition Platform. 'The cognition is the product. The surfaces are the medium.'
Stream closure document with G1 architecture mutation delta
